---
title: "NosAnalizamos"
author: "nihesan"
date: "2026-05-22"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#Carga de librerias
if(!require("pacman"))install.packages("pacman")
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, dplyr, readr, knitr, GGally, ggplot2)
```

```{r}
#Importación y limpieza del tsv
datos = read_tsv("data/NosAutoanalizamos2022 - Hoja1.tsv", skip=25)

datos = datos[,-1]
datos = datos[-nrow(datos),]

datos = datos%>%filter(if_any(everything(), ~ !is.na(.)&. != ""))%>%filter(Id!="martsobm")
```

```{r}
#Adecuación de calificaciones
datos = datos %>% mutate(across((c("ALG", "ANM", "FP", "DCS", "MD")), ~ {
    x = str_trim(.) 
    x = if_else(x == "NC", "3", x) 
    x = str_replace_all(x, ",", ".")
    as.numeric(x)
  }))
```

```{r}
#Tabla de estadísticos
tabla_estadisticos = datos %>%select(c("ALG", "ANM", "FP", "DCS", "MD")) %>%
pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "Asignatura", values_to = "Nota")%>% group_by(Asignatura) %>% summarise(Mínimo = min(Nota, na.rm = T),
    Percentil25 = quantile(Nota, 0.25, na.rm = T),
    Mediana = median(Nota, na.rm = T),
    Media = mean(Nota, na.rm = T),
    "Desviación Típica" = sd(Nota, na.rm = T),
    Percentil75 = quantile(Nota, 0.75, na.rm = T),
    Máximo = max(Nota, na.rm = T)) %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(., 2)))
tabla_estadisticos
```

```{r}
#Covarianza y Correlacion
ggpairs(datos %>%select(c("ALG", "ANM", "FP", "DCS", "MD")))

cov(datos %>%select(c("ALG", "ANM", "FP", "DCS", "MD")),use="complete.obs")
    
cor(datos %>%select(c("ALG", "ANM", "FP", "DCS", "MD")),use="complete.obs", method="pearson")

cor(datos %>%select(c("ALG", "ANM", "FP", "DCS", "MD")),use="complete.obs", method="spearman")

#Las variables con la mayor correlación son Matemática Discreta(MD) y Álgebra(ALG), con un 0.8005774 con pearson y un 0.8563333 con spearman
```

```{r}
#Boxplots
datos %>% select(c("ALG", "ANM", "FP", "DCS", "MD")) %>% pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "Asignatura", values_to = "Nota") %>%
filter(!is.na(Nota)) %>% ggplot(aes(x = Asignatura, y = Nota, fill = Asignatura)) + geom_boxplot() + geom_jitter() + labs(title = "Boxplots de calificaciones por asignatura",x = "Asignaturas",y = "Notas", fill = "Asignatura") 

datos %>% select(c("Sex", "ALG", "ANM", "FP", "DCS", "MD")) %>% pivot_longer(cols = all_of(c("ALG", "ANM", "FP", "DCS", "MD")), names_to = "Asignatura", values_to = "Nota") %>% filter(!is.na(Nota) & !is.na(Sex)) %>% ggplot(aes(x = Asignatura, y = Nota, fill = Sex)) + geom_boxplot() + geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.1, dodge.width = 1)) + labs(title = "Hombre Vs Mujer", x = "Asignaturas", y = "Notas numéricas",fill = "Sexo")
```
